entries.definition: just beginning to become known, noticeable, or important; newly developing or appearing
entries.exampleSentence: The conference showcases emerging technologies that could transform healthcare in the next decade.

entries.definition: present participle of emerge — coming out from somewhere; becoming known or visible; starting to exist or appear
entries.exampleSentence: A butterfly was emerging from its cocoon, slowly unfolding its wings for the first time.
